title: Security Training Tracker — Gamification Engine Live Integration
description: security_training.py has a full catalog with role-based requirements, per-user completion tracking, compliance mapping, and effectiveness metrics. The security_champions_engine.py (level BRONZE/SILVER/GOLD computation) lives in the same cluster but the two engines are not wired: completing training modules does not increment champion points, and the bug_bounty engine findings do not feed back into training requirement triggers.
missing: Wire training completion events to security_champions_engine: each completed module awards champion XP points based on category weight and quiz score
Bug bounty → training gap trigger: when a bug bounty finding matches a training category, auto-assign the corresponding module to the affected team
Certification expiry notification: 30/7/1-day ahead Slack/email alerts via notification_engine when certification expiry_date approaches
